strings.BASEFORM_BLOCK_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Tene</style>, ut valde minuas inveniens frontale vulnus, accipiens <style=cIsUtility>Limit</style> secundum vulnus bloccati. Si <style=cIsUtility>recte tempus</style>: nullificat vulnus omnium directionum, frigus peritiam, restaurat <style=cIsUtility>Magicae Potentiae</style> secundum vulnus bloccati, accipit <style=cIsUtility>duplicem Limit</style> et reflectit usque ad</style>0__3x vulnus</style>1__ bloccatum proximo hosti.
strings.BASEFORM_DASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis</style>. Labere brevem distantiam in quavis directione horizontali.
strings.BASEFORM_LIMITMENU_DESCRIPTION: Aperi menu Limit, quod sinet te uti inscriptis <style=cIsUtility>Limit Breaks</style>.
strings.BASEFORM_SLASH_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis</style>. Seca hostes ante te, inferens <style=cIsDamage>165% vulneris</style>.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_BASEFORM_BLOCK_DESCRI: <style=cIsUtility>Tene</style>, ut valde minuas inveniens frontale vulnus, accipiens <style=cIsUtility>Limit</style> secundum vulnus bloccati. Si <style=cIsUtility>recte tempus</style>: nullificat vulnus omnium directionum, frigus peritiam, restaurat <style=cIsUtility>Magicae Potentiae</style> secundum vulnus bloccati, accipit <style=cIsUtility>duplicem Limit</style> et reflectit usque ad</style>0__3x vulnus</style>1__ bloccatum proximo hosti.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_BASEFORM_DASH_DESCRIP: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis</style>. Labere brevem distantiam in quavis directione horizontali.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_BASEFORM_LIMITMENU_DE: Aperi menu Limit, sinens te uti inscriptis <style=cIsUtility>Limit Breaks</style>.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_BASEFORM_SLASH_DESCRI: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis</style>. Seca hostes ante te pro <style=cIsDamage>165% vulneris</style>.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_DESCRIPTION: Myst est versatilis superstes qui utitur <style=cIsUtility>Magic Power</style> ad utendum varietate supernaturalium peritiarum, et <style=cIsUtility>Limit</style> ad dissolvendum potentes super-motus.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_JOBCLASS_MYSTIC_DESCR: Incipe cursu cum versatili kit cum paululum omnium.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_JOBCLASS_SORCERER_DES: Incipe cursu cum kit focalizato in incantationes.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_JOBCLASS_WARRIOR_DESC: Incipe cursu cum kit focalizato in utendo Finisher impugnationibus.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_UI_LIMITDESCRIPTION: Aperi menu Limit, sinens te uti inscriptis Limit Breaks.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_UI_MAGICDESCRIPTION: Aperi menu Magic, sinens te uti inscriptis incantationibus.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_BODY_UI_TUTORIALDESCRIPTIO: Myst utitur duobus menuibus ad utendum suis inscriptis <style=cIsUtility>Spells</style> et dissolvendum peritias in eis reconditas.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_BERSERK_FORM_DESC: Myst irascitur, accipiens auctam celeritatem Motus et Altitudinem Saltus, sicut et corpus motuum focalizatum in impugnationibus.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_BLADE_DANCE_DESCR: Artisticum serenade ictuum secantium qui propellit utentem et inferit vulnus velociter.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_BLASTING_ZONE_DES: Evoca gigantem columnam vis ad involvendum Vorpal Sword, antequam agitas lamina ad percutiendum eum hostes ante te, inferens incredibile vulnus in lata area.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_CALL_LIGHTNING_DE: Evoca fulmen ictum ad tuum target, inferens vulnus et depellens hostes aereos e caelo.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_CHALLENGING_SHOUT: Emitte imperativum clamorem qui debilitat et trahit hostes ad te.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_CONE_OF_FROST_DES: Evoca conum venti glaciali ad inferendum vulnus et <style=cIsDamage>glaciare</style> hostes ante te.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_ECLIPSE_GATE_DESC: Evocat fragmentum potestatis umbralis ad inferendum vulnus target secundum absentem MP.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_EXPLOSION_DESCRIP: <style=cIsUtility>(Finishers differunt secundum utrum Myst in terra aut in aere sit)</style>. Tene positionem tuam et evoca Sphaeras Lucis ad orbitandam te, inferens vulnus et stupefaciens hostes prope.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_FATED_CIRCLE_DESC: Impugnatio rotans quae stupefacit et trahit hostes, sequuta per ignis explosions quae pellunt eos retro, inferens grave vulnus.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_FIREBALL_DESCRIPT: Pugnat globum ignis homing ad target qui explodit in impactu, inferens vulnus et <style=cIsDamage>incendens</style> hostes in area effectus.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_FORTIFY_DESCRIPTI: Post breve canal: praebet potens <style=cIsUtility>loricam</style> buff tibi et target socio.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_HASTE_DESCRIPTION: Post breve canal: praebet celeritatem Motus et Impugnationis tibi et target socio.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_JUDGEMENT_CUT_DES: Fias intangibilis et percutiens pluries in area effectus, inferens plus ictus cum altiore celeritate impugnationis.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_JUDGEMENT_CUT_END: Condate Vorpal Sword, accumulando energiam antequam dissolvis turbinem lightning-fast ictuum qui inferunt incredibile vulnus post moram.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_MAGIC_MISSILE_DES: Puga salven homing magica projecta quae targets quaerunt. Plus MP resultat in plus projecta pugnata.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_MAGNET_DESCRIPTIO: Evoca campum magneticum ad trahendos hostes in lata area circum target.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_MEND_WOUNDS_DESCR: Post breve canal: sanat te et target socium pro <style=cIsHealing>50% Maximae Valetudinis</style>.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_MP_TURBO_DESCRIPT: Linkatus Spell infligit plus vulnus et costat plus MP.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_SHILLELAGH_DESCRI: Cum in <style=cIsUtility>Magic Recharge</style>: infligit grave vulnus et restaurat Magic Power. Sed aliter, non impressionabilis.
strings.JAVANGLE_MYST_MAGICITE_ULTIMA_DESCRIPTIO: Post breve canal: expendit omnem remaining Magic Power ad creandam massivum vortex energiae qui infligit incredibile vulnus omnibus hostibus in lata area post longam moram.
strings.JOBCLASS_MYSTIC_DESCRIPTION: Incipe cursu cum versatili kit cum paululum omnium.
strings.JOBCLASS_SORCERER_DESCRIPTION: Incipe cursu cum kit focalizato in incantationes.
strings.JOBCLASS_WARRIOR_DESCRIPTION: Incipe cursu cum kit focalizato in utendo Finisher impugnationibus.
